items.name_cn:
🆕 M13185
This magnetic card holder is made of Monogram Macassar canvas, featuring bright leather lining and V-shaped card slots for a striking look, securely holding credit cards and transit cards. It has an integrated magnet for easy attachment to iPhone models with MagSafe technology.
Size: 9.5 x 0.5 x 6.5 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M11745 White] This zippy wallet is made of soft Mahina calfskin and embellished with an exquisite Monogram perforated pattern. The wallet features a secure full-zip design, with an organized interior featuring multiple pockets, compartments, and a business card slot. Additionally, the wallet can be carried as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width) C

items.name_cn:
M83649
Made of Monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "Portefeuil Lisa" is a compact wallet featuring a coin pocket with a strap and an LV circle pull. Its size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 11.5 1.5

items.name_en: 【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
items.name_cn:
【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
This coin purse belongs to the Candy Factory collection, dressing the brand mascot Vivienne in festive attire and paying tribute to the colorful holiday season with delicious seasonal candies, making it a perfect collector's gift. The monogram canvas creates a compact shape, while eye-catching metal details like the key ring and Vivienne-shaped zipper complete the look.
Size: 7 x 1.5 x 12 cm
